commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=90c7870961e7c93ddb52c4e8f42a5c4b2b23a72e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds bounded retry handling for Feishu message create/reply rate-limit responses and adds retry/concurrency tests for the Feishu send path.

PR surface: Source +71, Tests +409. Total +480 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main sends Feishu messages once and surfaces rate-limit failures without retry. The PR body also supplies live 230020 direct/reply proof, but I did not run a live Feishu account in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs author or maintainer action for live proof and a helper fix; ClawSweeper should not queue repair markers while real-environment proof remains contributor-owned.

target.title: fix(feishu): retry on send rate-limit errors (230020/230006)
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds retry logic (up to 2 retries, 500ms/1000ms linear backoff) to `requestFeishuApi` for Feishu send rate-limit error code `230020`.
- Both `im.message.create` (direct send) and `im.message.reply` (reply send) paths now go through retry.
- Exports `getFeishuSendRateLimitCode()` helper to detect retryable codes from AxiosError response shape.
- Adds 22 unit/integration tests covering concurrent send, retry exhaustion, backoff timing, and error message surfacing.

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm test extensions/feishu/src/send.retry.test.ts` вҖ” 13 tests pass
- [x] `pnpm test extensions/feishu/src/send.concurrent.test.ts` вҖ” 9 tests pass
- [x] Real 20-concurrent direct send stress test: 20/20 success after retry
- [x] Real 15-concurrent reply stress test: 15/15 success after retry

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed**: Feishu plugin now retries transient `230020` rate-limit errors on both direct send (`im.message.create`) and reply (`im.message.reply`) paths, instead of failing immediately and losing messages.

**Real environment tested**: Live Feishu API (`open.feishu.cn`), app `cli_aa947bd28afa5bd9`, macOS local OpenClaw dev build with `npx tsx` runner.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:

```
# Direct send stress test вҖ” 20 concurrent messages to same user
npx tsx scripts/feishu-stress-real.mts

# Reply stress test вҖ” 15 concurrent replies to a single seed message
npx tsx scripts/feishu-stress-reply.mts --count=15
```

**Evidence after fix**:

Direct send (`im.message.create`) вҖ” 20 concurrent:
```
[config] appId=cli_aa947bd28afa5bd9  target=ou_33af95b6f9c0e5fbcaccef732f03d720  count=20

Firing 20 concurrent sends through requestFeishuApi (with retry) вҖҰ

  (Г—10 rate-limit 230020 hits вҖ” all retried automatically)

  [10] вң“ 1609ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec44878f0a0b3c1c92d40adb2d
  [20] вң“ 1613ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec448782ca0b1c56b3f9cac777
  [11] вң“ 1627ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec4487850a0b1934d47f23f5ee
  [17] вң“ 2708ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec4480bc478b1fe39b7f652100

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ summary в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
  total     : 20
  succeeded : 20
  failed    : 0
  wall time : 2709 ms
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
```

Reply send (`im.message.reply`) вҖ” 15 concurrent:
```
[config] appId=cli_aa947bd28afa5bd9  target=ou_33af95b6f9c0e5fbcaccef732f03d720  count=15

[step 1] вң“ seed message_id = om_x100b6ecbc38750b8b29ba53f44a8667
[step 2] Firing 15 concurrent replies through requestFeishuApi (with retry) вҖҰ

  (Г—5 rate-limit 230020 hits вҖ” all retried and succeeded)

  [01] вң“ 850ms   msg_id=om_x100b6ecbc395fca0b01e118c0d0feea
  [04] вң“ 1112ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ecbc39128acb129b0880a4324d
  [15] вң“ 1192ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ecbc390f0a8b1d802607f077e1
  [06] вң“ 1603ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ecbc3a954b0b4b3d0ce617fa06

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ reply summary в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
  total     : 15
  succeeded : 15
  failed    : 0
  wall time : 1604 ms
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
```

**Observed result after fix**:
- Direct send: 10/20 initially rate-limited вҶ’ retried вҶ’ **20/20 success**
- Reply send: 5/15 initially rate-limited вҶ’ retried вҶ’ **15/15 success**
- Before fix: rate-limited messages were lost permanently with no retry.

**What was not tested**: 20-concurrent reply to the same message exhausts the bounded retry for 4/20 (reply endpoint has stricter per-message rate limit). The 2-retry/linear-backoff design handles normal production concurrency (вүӨ15) without message loss.

Closes #70879
target.author: ladygege

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
```

**Observed result after fix**:
- Direct send: 10/20 initially rate-limited вҶ’ retried вҶ’ **20/20 success**
- Reply send: 5/15 initially rate-limited вҶ’ retried вҶ’ **15/15 success**
- Before fix: rate-limited messages were lost permanently with no retry.

**What was not tested**: 20-concurrent reply to the same message exhausts the bounded retry for 4/20 (reply endpoint has stricter per-message rate limit). The 2-retry/linear-backoff design handles normal production concurrency (вүӨ15) without message loss.

Closes #70879

target.title: fix(feishu): retry on send rate-limit errors (230020/230006)
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds retry logic (up to 2 retries, 500ms/1000ms linear backoff) to `requestFeishuApi` for Feishu send rate-limit error code `230020`.
- Both `im.message.create` (direct send) and `im.message.reply` (reply send) paths now go through retry.
- Exports `getFeishuSendRateLimitCode()` helper to detect retryable codes from AxiosError response shape.
- Adds 22 unit/integration tests covering concurrent send, retry exhaustion, backoff timing, and error message surfacing.

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm test extensions/feishu/src/send.retry.test.ts` вҖ” 13 tests pass
- [x] `pnpm test extensions/feishu/src/send.concurrent.test.ts` вҖ” 9 tests pass
- [x] Real 20-concurrent direct send stress test: 20/20 success after retry
- [x] Real 15-concurrent reply stress test: 15/15 success after retry

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed**: Feishu plugin now retries transient `230020` rate-limit errors on both direct send (`im.message.create`) and reply (`im.message.reply`) paths, instead of failing immediately and losing messages.

**Real environment tested**: Live Feishu API (`open.feishu.cn`), app `cli_aa947bd28afa5bd9`, macOS local OpenClaw dev build with `npx tsx` runner.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:

```
# Direct send stress test вҖ” 20 concurrent messages to same user
npx tsx scripts/feishu-stress-real.mts

# Reply stress test вҖ” 15 concurrent replies to a single seed message

```

Direct send (`im.message.create`) вҖ” 20 concurrent:

  failed    : 0
  wall time : 1604 ms
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
```

**Observed result after fix**:
- Direct send: 10/20 initially rate-limited вҶ’ retried вҶ’ **20/20 success**
- Reply send: 5/15 initially rate-limited вҶ’ retried вҶ’ **15/15 success**
- Before fix: rate-limited messages were lost permanently with no retry.

**What was not tested**: 20-concurrent reply to the same message exhausts the bounded retry for 4/20 (reply endpoint has stricter per-message rate limit). The 2-retry/linear-backoff design handles normal production concurrency (вүӨ15) without message loss.

Closes #70879
